programme.title: My Best Fiend
programme.desc: In the 1950s, a teenage Werner Herzog was transfixed by a film performance of the young Klaus Kinski. Years later, they would share an apartment where, in an unabated, 48 hour fit of rage, Kinski completely destroyed the bathroom. From this chaos, a violent, love-hate, profoundly creative partnership was born. In 1972, Herzog cast Kinski in Aguirre, Wrath of God. Four more films would follow. In this personal documentary, Herzog traces the often violent ups and downs of their relationship, revisiting the various locations of their films and talking to the people they worked with.

programme.title: WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas attracted a massive field of 2,960 entrants nearly doubling the record setting $15 million guaranteed prizepool to an astonishing $29 million. Nine players remain to contend for a first place payout of $4.1 million along with the honor of having their name forever inscribed on the Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup. Benny Glaser hopes to maintain his commanding chip lead as play continues from nine players down to six.

programme.title: WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: The competition for the prestigious title of WPT World Champion is down to the final six players. Each of the six remaining players have guaranteed themselves a minimum prize of $1 million, but everyone has their eye on the top prize of $4.1 million. Who has what it takes to become WPT World Champion?

programme.title: WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: As the WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas reaches its climax, four players remain in contention. The ultimate winner will receive $4.1 million to go along with their name added to the prestigious Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup and of course the coveted title of WPT World Champion. Don’t miss any of the thrilling action as we play down to the crowning of the WPT World Champion.

programme.title: S1E1 Lucha
programme.desc: Ian Hodgkinson, known as Vampiro in the world of wrestling, was a famed wrestler in the late 80’s and 90’s. Today, he shifted his career to being behind the scenes as a Story Producer for AAA, the top wrestling company in Lucha Libre. Hodgkinson intimately peels back the curtain on the mysteries of this show, how it’s produced, and what life is like on and off the stage. We dive deep in to the lives of two wrestlers and follow their stories as they prep for their next fight: El Hijo Del Fantasma, an up and coming star who seemingly has it all, as well as Faby Apache, a veteran female wrestler struggling to stay relevant as she raises her son.

programme.title: The Dude Ranger 1934,
programme.desc: A wealthy Easterner inherits a Western ranch and goes undercover as a cowboy to investigate a corrupt foreman who is plotting to seize the property for himself

programme.title: Dead Aim
programme.desc: A traveling gravedigger during an (unspecified) war adopts a orphan he finds alone in the desert. After the war with the orphan grown and business slow, the orphan begins to generate business himself by shooting people

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos 1941
programme.desc: Roy Rogers stars in Robin Hood of the Pecos, a stirring tale set in the turbulent days after the Civil War. When corrupt officials exploit and oppress Texas ranchers, Roy rises as a champion of the people—fighting injustice with his six-guns and his songs. With the help of Gabby Hayes and heroine Marjorie Reynolds, he takes on the villains to bring peace and fairness back to the frontier. Filled with action, music, and Roy’s trademark charm, this Western delivers justice in true outlaw-hero style.

programme.title: Maker Nation Challenge: Artists Forge Fine Jewelry Masterpieces
